creative_brief: Split image showing supermarket produce shelf vs Rachel at her farm with cattle, emphasizing the direct connection and freshness difference.
primary_text:
What if you could own a piece of the grocery store you buy from? Rachel's beef from the NSW coast reaches Sydney families in days, not weeks. No wholesalers marking it up. FarmThru connects you direct to named regenerative farms across NSW. Order what you want, collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday.

No middlemen. Sydney families already collect from the Brookvale hub. We can't promise returns, but we can show you everything.
headline: Invest in the grocery store you want
description: Farm-direct food from named NSW farms. Equity crowdfunding live on Birchal. Not financial advice.
